meaning: adj.免费的,邮费(运费)准免的
examples: At that point Franco was desirous of prolonging the war.
Ministers expressed broad support for the Franco-German plan.
When public opinion is particularly polarised, as it was following the end of the Franco regime, monarchs can rise above "mere" politics and "embody" a spirit of national unity.
Guille Franco sent a flick against an upright on the hour as Villarreal provided stubborn resistance.
It still appears that Bayer may buy Aventis CropScience, the agricultural division of Franco-German drug giant Aventis .
